name: Simple-Interest Ending Balance (Single Value)
short_description: Calculates the ending balance of a simple-interest savings account given the principal, annual interest rate, and time in years.

inputs.name: r
inputs.description: Annual simple interest rate as a decimal.

name: Mobile Transfer Total Deduction
short_description: Calculates the total amount deducted from an account for a mobile transfer, including the transfer amount and a percentage-based fee.

inputs.name: A
inputs.description: The amount of money to be transferred.

inputs.name: f
inputs.description: The fee rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.01 for 1%).

name: Future Value of Monthly Deposits
short_description: Calculates the future value of a series of equal monthly deposits (an ordinary annuity) given an annual nominal interest rate and the total number of months.

inputs.name: annual_rate
inputs.description: The annual nominal interest rate as a decimal

inputs.name: months
inputs.description: The total number of months for deposits

name: Highest-Spend Dollar Amount
short_description: Calculates the total spending for each category from a list of transactions and identifies the highest total spend amount.

inputs.name: transactions_list
inputs.description: A list of financial transactions, each containing a category (string) and an amount (float), e.g., '[("Food Delivery", 25.50), ("Streaming", 15.00)]'

name: Loan Payoff Months After Extra Payment
short_description: Calculates the number of remaining months on a loan after an extra lump sum payment is made at a specified point in the loan term, considering the original principal, annual rate, and loan years.

inputs.name: annual_rate
inputs.description: Annual interest rate (APR) as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

inputs.name: years
inputs.description: Original total loan term in years.

inputs.name: extra_month
inputs.description: The month number (from the start of the loan) when the extra payment is made.

inputs.name: extra_payment
inputs.description: Amount of the extra lump sum payment made.
